calibrated.title: Atlas Root
calibrated.before: Reality Mechanics is the discipline of keeping relation traceable as order. Generative order and reading order are distinct: generation occurs through active re
calibrated.after: The root entrance to Reality Mechanics and the Atlas: the working postulate, dependency spine, posture read, order crossing map, and entry practice.

calibrated.title: Bounded Asymmetry
calibrated.before: Bounded asymmetry names asymmetry localised enough to become distinguishable. Where [[Asymmetry]] names unevenness within relation before it is located, bounded
calibrated.after: The hinge where uneven relation becomes local enough to be distinguished — asymmetry held locally enough that a boundary can form.

calibrated.title: Emergent Condition
calibrated.before: Emergent condition names the class of first-order conditions that arise from within relation through asymmetry rather than being imposed from outside it or esta
calibrated.after: The class of first-order conditions that arise from within relation through asymmetry — prior to operation, arising without external cause.

calibrated.title: Resolved Asymmetry
calibrated.before: Resolved asymmetry names strained asymmetry determined at the current scope: settled enough to remain distinguishable without collapsing into sameness. Where [[
calibrated.after: Strained asymmetry determined at the current scope — settled enough to remain distinguishable without collapsing into sameness.

calibrated.title: Strained Asymmetry
calibrated.before: Strained asymmetry names bounded asymmetry under contrast. Where bounded asymmetry names localised unevenness available for distinction, strained asymmetry name
calibrated.after: Bounded asymmetry under contrast — the condition through which localised unevenness becomes consequential.

calibrated.title: Operational Condition
calibrated.before: Operational condition names the class of first-order conditions through which located distinction becomes available, contrasted, held, and determined. Where eme
calibrated.after: The class of first-order conditions that act on located distinction — locating, making available, straining, bearing, and resolving.

calibrated.title: Operation Carrier
calibrated.before: Operation carrier names the class of primitive carriers that carry the reading operation across the system. Where operational conditions act on distinction at s
calibrated.after: The class of primitive carriers that make conditions readable across the system.

calibrated.title: Structural Carrier
calibrated.before: Structural carrier names the class of primitive carriers that carry relation into later structural compounds through small relation-words. Where operation carri
calibrated.after: The class of primitive carriers that transmit specific relational roles into later compounds through small relation-words.

calibrated.title: Threshold (First → Second)
calibrated.before: This threshold names the crossing from First Order into Second Order.
calibrated.after: The crossing where held first-order carry is entered and enacted as second-order carrying.

calibrated.title: Recursive Regulation
calibrated.before: Recursive regulation names regulation occurring through recursive carrying. Where regulation names carrying maintained within condition and recursive names carr
calibrated.after: Regulation occurring through recursive carrying.

calibrated.title: Carrying
calibrated.before: Carrying : Retracing. Carrying enacts held forward availability; Retracing follows the backward availability of the same held connection — one connection, read
calibrated.after: Held forward availability being enacted.

calibrated.title: Apparent Bearing
calibrated.before: Apparent bearing names bearing becoming presented. Where bearing names strain held as a readable condition, apparent bearing names the condition through which t
calibrated.after: Bearing becoming presented.

calibrated.title: Bearing Read
calibrated.before: Bearing read names the class of second-order produced reads through which bearing becomes readable in specific ways — as presented, visible, invisible, divisibl
calibrated.after: The class of second-order produced reads through which bearing becomes readable in specific ways — as presented, visible, invisible, divisible, or indivisible.

calibrated.title: Divisible Bearing
calibrated.before: Divisible bearing names bearing that can be separated into distinguishable parts without losing the carrying condition. Where bearing names strain held, divisib
calibrated.after: Bearing that can be separated into distinguishable parts without losing the carrying condition.

calibrated.title: Indivisible Bearing
calibrated.before: Indivisible bearing names bearing that cannot be separated without changing the carrying condition. Where divisible bearing names holding across divisions, indi
calibrated.after: Bearing that cannot be separated without changing the carrying condition.

calibrated.title: Order-Terminal
calibrated.before: Order-terminal names terminality relative to an order: the condition of a term when that term completes the readable length of its order.
calibrated.after: Terminality relative to an order — the point where a readable length completes within its order and cannot continue as the same read.

calibrated.title: Closure Scope
calibrated.before: Closure scope names the bounded extent within which a read can be evaluated as holding. [[Closure]] names a read becoming bounded enough for evaluation; closure
calibrated.after: The bounded extent within which a read can be evaluated as holding.

calibrated.title: Coupled Asymmetry
calibrated.before: Coupled asymmetry names resolved asymmetry held between coupled conditions. Where resolved asymmetry names a determined condition and coupling names resolved co
calibrated.after: Resolved asymmetry held between coupled conditions.

calibrated.title: Nested Relation
calibrated.before: Nested relation names asymmetrical relation: relation participating within relation. Where within names relation held with inside placement and nesting names a
calibrated.after: Asymmetrical relation — one relation participating within, and remaining ordered by, another relation.

calibrated.title: Structural Gathering
calibrated.before: Structural gathering names multiple participating relations held as one readable arrangement. Where nested relation names relation participating within relation
calibrated.after: Multiple participating relations held as one readable arrangement.

calibrated.title: Delayed Availability
calibrated.before: Delayed availability names uneven availability across traversal — the condition through which what should be available at one point in a sequence becomes availa
calibrated.after: Uneven availability across traversal — the condition through which what should be available at one point in a sequence becomes available only later, or not at all within the current scope.

calibrated.title: Dependency Disorder
calibrated.before: Dependency disorder names disorder in which the dependency path itself becomes unreadable. Where disorder names stability no longer holding, dependency disorder
calibrated.after: Disorder in which the dependency path itself becomes unreadable.

calibrated.title: Threshold (Second → Third)
calibrated.before: This threshold names the crossing from Second Order into Third Order.
calibrated.after: The crossing where carrying through recurring participation begins to organise into a field.

calibrated.title: Branch
calibrated.before: A Branch names a dependency path through participation. It is a traceable path through what a field or domain depends on, carries, and opens. Branches can occur
calibrated.after: A dependency path through participation.

calibrated.title: Domain
calibrated.before: A Domain names an organised participation context. A domain organises one or more fields into a recognisable context, practice, discipline, institution, method,
calibrated.after: An organised participation context.

calibrated.title: AI Availability
calibrated.before: AI availability names what becomes usable within an AI interaction at the current closure scope.
calibrated.after: The closure-scope condition inside AI interaction — what the current exchange opens as usable without outrunning the participant's ability to test, carry, or retrace it.

calibrated.title: AI Coupling
calibrated.before: AI coupling names maintained Engineered Coupling between human read, machine output, Atlas structure, and evaluative proceeding.
calibrated.after: The coupling condition specific to AI interaction — where human read, generated output, Atlas structure, and evaluative proceeding remain compatibly joined so that the output can be tested and retraced.

calibrated.title: AI Drift
calibrated.before: AI drift occurs when generated output departs from Atlas-derived structure while preserving surface coherence.
calibrated.after: The disorder condition through which generated output departs from the dependency structure it claims to carry while preserving surface coherence — the specifically generated form of Source Drift.

calibrated.title: AI Misrepair
calibrated.before: AI misrepair names repair-like generated continuation that preserves interaction without restoring compatible grounding.
calibrated.after: The disorder condition through which generated continuation preserves interaction while failing to restore compatible structural grounding — the specifically generated form of Misrepair.

calibrated.title: AI Confident Correction
calibrated.before: AI Confident Correction reads a local case where an AI answer appears to repair an error while preserving the wrong grounding.
calibrated.after: The applied read of AI Misrepair — where a correction appears to repair an error while preserving the wrong grounding.

calibrated.title: AI Reply Drift
calibrated.before: AI Reply Drift reads a local case where an AI answer remains fluent while losing the dependency path it claims to carry.
calibrated.after: The applied read of AI Drift at the level of a single reply — where an AI answer remains fluent while losing the dependency path it claims to carry.

calibrated.title: Documentation Gap
calibrated.before: Documentation Gap reads a local architecture case where the representation no longer carries what the built condition requires.
calibrated.after: The local architecture case where the representation no longer carries what the built condition requires.

calibrated.title: Architectural Boundary
calibrated.before: Architectural boundary names where built form locates relational separation.
calibrated.after: Where built form locates relational separation.

calibrated.title: Architectural Carrying
calibrated.before: Architectural carrying names compatible Bearing participation within built form.
calibrated.after: Compatible Bearing participation within built form.

calibrated.title: Architectural Constraint
calibrated.before: Architectural constraint names limiting conditions that shape available built resolution.
calibrated.after: Limiting conditions that shape available built resolution.

calibrated.title: Architectural Documentation
calibrated.before: Architectural documentation names representational carrying for built resolution.
calibrated.after: Representational carrying for built resolution.

calibrated.title: Architectural Resolution
calibrated.before: Architectural resolution names determination of built carrying across design conditions, construction conditions, regulatory conditions, and occupation.
calibrated.after: Determination of built carrying across design conditions, construction conditions, regulatory conditions, and occupation.

calibrated.title: Architectural Visibility
calibrated.before: Architectural visibility names what becomes readable within a built condition.
calibrated.after: What becomes readable within a built condition.

calibrated.title: Load-Bearing
calibrated.before: Load-bearing is an architectural and applied carrying read. It names participation that carries required Bearing for compatible Coupling within a Domain conditi
calibrated.after: The architectural read where required bearing continues through built use without exceeding load, capacity, carrying, or compatibility.

calibrated.title: Inherited Term Drift
calibrated.before: Inherited Term Drift reads a local case where a received term keeps its name while entering a different structural role.
calibrated.after: The local case where a received term keeps its name while entering a different structural role.

calibrated.title: Organised Domain
calibrated.before: An Organised Domain names an intentionally arranged participation context. An Organised Domain is not the same as an Organic Field. It organises one or more fie
calibrated.after: An intentionally arranged participation context where one or more fields become organised into practice, discipline, institution, method, model, framework, or applied arrangement.

calibrated.title: Parenting Boundary
calibrated.before: Parenting Boundary reads a local case where parental care must locate a boundary that preserves availability without forcing dependence.
calibrated.after: The local case where parental care must locate a boundary that preserves availability without forcing dependence.

calibrated.title: Parenting Repair
calibrated.before: Parenting Repair reads a local case where parental relation must restore bearing after harm, neglect, rupture, or misrepair.
calibrated.after: The local case where parental relation must restore bearing after harm, neglect, rupture, or misrepair.

calibrated.title: Protective Control
calibrated.before: Protective Control reads a local parenting case where control enters to protect dependent availability after risk, harm, or insufficient bearing. It remains pro
calibrated.after: The local parenting case where control enters to protect dependent availability after risk, harm, or insufficient bearing.

calibrated.title: Pace Mismatch
calibrated.before: Pace Mismatch reads a local teaching case where instruction continues faster than learning can be compatibly borne.
calibrated.after: The local teaching case where instruction continues faster than learning can be compatibly borne.

calibrated.title: Learning Pace
calibrated.before: Learning pace names how learning participation remains compatibly carried through a teaching condition without exceeding available bearing.
calibrated.after: How learning participation remains compatibly carried through a teaching condition without exceeding available bearing.

calibrated.title: Teaching Boundary
calibrated.before: Teaching boundary names a branch-level boundary condition that preserves learning participation from overrun, collapse, or imposed order.
calibrated.after: A branch-level boundary condition that preserves learning participation from overrun, collapse, or imposed order.

calibrated.title: Field of Participation
calibrated.before: A Field of Participation names a recurring organisation arising through participation. It becomes available where participation repeatedly organises through the
calibrated.after: A recurring organisation arising through participation.

calibrated.title: Fatigue Boundary
calibrated.before: Fatigue Boundary reads a local body case where fatigue marks the limit of available effort and asks whether action should pause, reduce, continue, or receive su
calibrated.after: The applied read of the located limit on available carrying — the closure scope at which continued participation becomes incompatible with current capacity.

calibrated.title: Self-Control
calibrated.before: Self-control names self-bearing directing availability under strain so feeling, emotion, thought, or impulse does not become incompatible action.
calibrated.after: The condition through which self-bearing delays or governs the carrying of an impulse — available bearing that regulates what the self carries forward.

calibrated.title: Self-Harm
calibrated.before: Self-harm names self-directed harm where self-bearing, self-control, or safety becomes unavailable under strain.
calibrated.after: The applied read of a closure scope where self-bearing fails and carrying turns against the self's own available conditions.

calibrated.title: Cognitive Carrying
calibrated.before: Cognitive carrying names the Bearing participation required to keep information available for use.
calibrated.after: The condition through which a cognitive state — thought, orientation, or pattern — is continued through participation rather than discharged or discarded.

calibrated.title: Cognitive Reads
calibrated.before: Cognitive reads name branch-level reads concerned with pre-explicit availability, memory, retained readability, operation on readable order, discernment, wisdom
calibrated.after: The set of path reads through which thought and memory become evaluable at a closure scope — the branch of reads that apply cognitive structural conditions to specific passages.

calibrated.title: Externalised Cognition
calibrated.before: Externalised cognition names branch-level carrying where cognitive participation is distributed into external structure.
calibrated.after: The condition through which cognitive carrying is extended through a medium — thought, memory, or knowing carried beyond the participant's body through tool, record, or system.

calibrated.title: Self-Bearing
calibrated.before: Self-bearing is a constrained compound read linking Self and Bearing.
calibrated.after: The condition through which the self carries its own strain — bearing held within the participant's own cognitive carrying rather than displaced or collapsed.

calibrated.title: Language Field
calibrated.before: A Language Field names a recurring field of participation through which readable difference through medium becomes available. A language field is not defined by
calibrated.after: The recurring field of participation through which readable difference through medium becomes available — the field from which language, representation, and translation emerge.

calibrated.title: Reality Check
calibrated.before: Reality check names branch-level evaluation of whether a read remains structurally compatible with its bearing source.
calibrated.after: The evaluative read through which a claim, representation, or local model is checked for compatibility with what bears it — the closure-scope test of whether a read remains traceable.

calibrated.title: Over-Treatment
calibrated.before: Over-Treatment reads a local life case where repair-like intervention exceeds compatible bearing and worsens the condition it means to support.
calibrated.after: The applied read where intervention proceeds as repair but exceeds supportable capacity at the relevant closure scope — incompatible carrying in the name of restoration.

calibrated.title: Cosmic Polarity Read
calibrated.before: Cosmic Polarity Read applies [[Resolution Polarity]] to natural-world physical-field reads, comparing [[Light]], [[Gravity]], [[Dark Matter]], [[Dark Energy]],
calibrated.after: The applied comparison through which physical-field cases — gravity, dark matter, dark energy, light, and black holes — are read against Resolution Polarity.

calibrated.title: Apology Without Repair
calibrated.before: Apology Without Repair reads a local relation case where repair-language preserves proceeding without restoring the bearing that was broken.
calibrated.after: The applied read of a closure-scope condition where acknowledgement of harm occurs without compatible re-bearing.

calibrated.title: Care Without Bearing
calibrated.before: Care Without Bearing reads a local case where care-language is present while the required bearing is absent or unavailable.
calibrated.after: The applied read of care whose preservation of availability cannot sustain bearing at the relevant closure scope.

calibrated.title: Control After Harm
calibrated.before: Control After Harm reads a local case where control enters after damaged bearing and must be checked for protection, repair, or further harm.
calibrated.after: The applied read where control is exercised following harm — direction of availability in the context of incompatible carrying that preceded it.

calibrated.title: Control Drift
calibrated.before: Control Drift reads a local case where directed availability stops receiving the bearing condition it directs and begins forcing proceeding.
calibrated.after: The applied read where control departs from compatible directed availability, becoming incompatible carrying beyond the closure scope of its relational grounding.

calibrated.title: Maintained Coupling Failure
calibrated.before: Maintained Coupling Failure reads a local case where coupling persists as relation while the supportive or corrective bearing required to maintain it fails.
calibrated.after: The applied read where maintained coupling loses its stability at a closure scope — where the condition of held distinct relation fails to sustain.

calibrated.title: Reciprocity Breakdown
calibrated.before: Reciprocity Breakdown reads a local case where mutual participation no longer remains compatibly borne.
calibrated.after: The applied read where reciprocal bearing within participation fails at a closure scope — where bearing no longer moves compatibly between participants.

calibrated.title: Repair Mismatch
calibrated.before: Repair Mismatch reads a local case where repair is attempted but does not re-enter the lost bearing into compatible carrying.
calibrated.after: The applied read where repair is attempted but addresses the wrong scope, condition, or bearing gap — restoration that misses where it needs to land.

calibrated.title: Surface Patch
calibrated.before: Surface Patch reads a local case where visible repair allows proceeding while the bearing condition that required repair remains unrestored.
calibrated.after: The applied read where repair restores surface coherence without restoring compatible bearing — proceeding that appears repaired while the underlying condition remains unrestored.

calibrated.title: Bearing Relations
calibrated.before: Bearing relations name the third-order relation family where [[Bearing Relation]] is read through downstream carrying relations.
calibrated.after: The subdomain of relational-participation reads where coupling, bearing, and carrying become readable as held relational conditions.

calibrated.title: Constrained Resolution
calibrated.before: Constrained resolution names compatible Resolution sustained under limiting Constraint conditions.
calibrated.after: Resolution where what can be determined at scope is bounded by a prior constraint — bearing settling into a determined condition within limited options.

calibrated.title: Engineered Coupling
calibrated.before: Engineered coupling is compatible Coupling carried through imposed, constructed, corrected, intentionally arranged, or externally maintained carrying conditions
calibrated.after: Coupling that is deliberately constructed to hold distinct resolved conditions in compatible mutual availability — coupling shaped by constraint and carrying rather than emergent.

calibrated.title: Maintained Coupling
calibrated.before: Maintained coupling is compatible Coupling sustained through corrective or supportive Bearing.
calibrated.after: The condition through which distinct coupled relation is held stable through recurrence — coupling that sustains across encounters and strain.

calibrated.title: Nested Coupling
calibrated.before: Nested coupling names Coupling that becomes available as participation in further coupling.
calibrated.after: Coupling held within a larger coupling structure — distinct resolved conditions in mutual availability where that availability is itself carried within a containing relation.

calibrated.title: Safety Boundary
calibrated.before: Safety boundary names a branch-level boundary condition that preserves compatible participation.
calibrated.after: The located condition through which safe passage, harm-prevention, or compatible carrying is bounded — the structural edge that separates compatible from incompatible relation.

calibrated.title: Organic Field
calibrated.before: An Organic Field names a recurring field of participation that arises through Natural Order participating. Biological life can show organic organisation, but or
calibrated.after: A recurring field of participation.

calibrated.title: Path Reads
calibrated.before: Path Reads name reusable reads that become available by following a dependency path.
calibrated.after: Reusable reads that become available by following a dependency path.

calibrated.title: Threshold (Third → Higher)
calibrated.before: This threshold names the crossing from Third Order into Higher Order.
calibrated.after: The crossing where organised and nested carrying enters its own carrying.

calibrated.title: Retrace Practice
calibrated.before: Order Trace : Retrace Practice. Order Trace follows dependency movement forward; Retrace Practice recovers it backward — the same path, read in the direction it
calibrated.after: The Atlas [[Practice]] of recovering the dependency path that produced the current read.

calibrated.title: AI Participation
calibrated.before: How an AI participates inside the Atlas without inventing theory. The Atlas is a reasoning system, so AI participates by tracing structure rather than answering
calibrated.after: The participation rule for AI working inside the Atlas without inventing theory, grounding notes, or collapsing dependency order.

calibrated.title: Current Record Convention
calibrated.before: Records the current repository convention used to encode [[Common Term Structure]].
calibrated.after: The current repository convention used to encode Common Term Structure as Markdown, frontmatter, headings, and wikilinks.

calibrated.title: Invariants
calibrated.before: Statements demonstrated repeatedly across the grounded Atlas. Extracted, not invented — each is cited to its source and should be confirmed there before groundi
calibrated.after: The current invariant read extracted from the Atlas so repeated structural constraints can be checked without being mistaken for new primitives.
